title: 2pcs Plant Fleece Frost Protection Jackets, 50gms 80cm x 100cm Winter Garden Fleece Bag, Plant Cover for for Potted Plant Winter Plant Protection, From Birds and Insects
features: Accommodating Design: The garden fleece jacket has easy drawstring at the opening making it easy and quick to cover your plants during harsh weather conditions.

Protects and Insulates: Muzhira’s horticultural fleece cover is made of high-quality durable material with high tensile strength and tear resistance. Our sophisticated design allows our fleece the ability to provide your plants with UV protection while also allowing air, moisture, and sunlight to properly filter through. In addition, our fleece’s bound edges will provide protection for the lid, creating extra warmth and insulation for your plant.

Wide Application: Apply this fleece bag plant covering on any desired properly sized plants. Guaranteed to protect your plants from snow, hail, frost, insects and even birds during their growing season, No need to remove and replace in the morning or evening.
Satisfaction Guaranteed: we care about our customers and your product experience! If you have any problems please contact us and we will reply to you within 24 hours.
description: Muzhira Plant Frost Protection Fleece Jacket is the Best Choice for Your Garden; The Muzhira garden fleece plant cover is made of high-quality polypropylene fabric with great durability. This thicker and warmer garden fleece will provide the necessary frost protection for your plants. The enhanced protection the fleece bag provides will protect your plants all the way down to -5/6ºC. The ideal usage of the fleece is for tender plants and shrubs as well as protecting early potatoes. Features: 1. Allows air, ultraviolet rays and a small amount of rain to enter, allowing plants to be properly watered and ventilated naturally. 2. Protects your plants from frost, wind and too much sunlight. Product Parameter： Weight: 50g/m² Material: non-woven fabric Available sizes: 60cm x 80cm, 80cm x 100cm, 120cm x 180cm Packaging: Quantity: 2 pieces. Size: 80cm x 100cm. Weight: 50g/m².
